# BB — Boris Best
> Claude Code Best Practices Knowledge Base

A curated, public knowledge base of best practices for Claude Code, aggregated from Boris Cherny (Head of Claude Code at Anthropic) and the community.

## Source
Based on https://github.com/shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice by Shan Raisshan.

## Content
- 164+ tips organized by category (workflow, context, security, automation, debugging, prompting, git, mcp, hooks, agentic)
- 8 core concepts (context window, agentic loop, tool use, MCP, hooks, CLAUDE.md, headless mode, permission model)
- 6 contributing authors with source attribution on every entry
- Community reports, workflows, and FAQ

## API Endpoints
- /llms.txt — this file
- /api/tips.json — machine-readable tips index (coming soon)
- /sitemap.xml — full sitemap

## Attribution
Every tip links to its original author and source. Not affiliated with Anthropic.
